title: Clean Heat Market Mechanism: revisions ahead of Scheme Year 2 (2026 to 2027)
body: "Following the launch of the Clean Heat Market Mechanism on 1 April 2025, this consultation seeks views on the government’s proposals for Year 2 of the scheme, which include:   setting a Year 2 heat pump target level within the proposed range of 8-10% of relevant boiler sales naming MCS as the sole certification scheme for the Clean Heat Market Mechanism   "
